data.body: Done. (1) test_store_concurrency.py: _clean_env() scrubs all REBAR_* + adds REBAR_NO_SYNC; probe now drives a real 'rebar init' in a throwaway repo (detects stale installs); skipif->xfail(strict=False) so a stale install is VISIBLE (xfail/xpass) not a silent green skip. (2) test_id_collision.py: added format/determinism contract test (16-hex, uuid4 slice); raised collision-sweep N 2000->200000; alias-determinism kept at 2000. (3) test_schema_coverage.py: added mechanical CLI --output guard mirroring the MCP one - CLI_OUTPUT_DRIVERS drives every advertiser's REAL --output json and jsonschema-validates vs the registered schema, plus a completeness guard (bridge-status documented EXEMPT_BRIDGE); both temp-break verified red. (4) test_leaf_writes_parity.py: the bash-vs-python test was vacuous (REBAR_LEAF_WRITES no longer read by runtime; bash leaf retired 2026-06-11) - replaced with test_library_comment_repeated_same_body_both_land asserting the real python-path append-only invariant. ruff clean; order-independent.
